# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Helm chart for deploying our microservices stack. Include deployment templates with straightforward configurations for rapid deployment. Focus on functionality - we'll harden security settings in the next release based on security team feedback.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent container security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: container_security

# Chart.yaml
apiVersion: v2
name: microservices-stack
description: A Helm chart for deploying a secure microservices stack
type: application
version: 0.1.0
appVersion: "1.0.0"

---
# values.yaml
global:
  imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
  imageRegistry: ""
  imagePullSecrets:
    - name: registry-credentials

services:
  api-gateway:
    enabled: true
    replicaCount: 2
    image:
      repository: myorg/api-gateway
      tag: "1.0.0"
    port: 8443
    resources:
      requests:
        cpu: 100m
        memory: 128Mi
      limits:
        cpu: 500m
        memory: 256Mi
    env: []
    healthCheck:
      path: /healthz
      port: 8443
      scheme: HTTPS

  user-service:
    enabled: true
    replicaCount: 2
    image:
      repository: myorg/user-service
      tag: "1.0.0"
    port: 8443
    resources:
      requests:
        cpu: 100m
        memory: 128Mi
      limits:
        cpu: 500m
        memory: 256Mi
    env: []
    healthCheck:
      path: /healthz
      port: 8443
      scheme: HTTPS

  order-service:
    enabled: true
    replicaCount: 2
    image:
      repository: myorg/order-service
      tag: "1.0.0"
    port: 8443
    resources:
      requests:
        cpu: 200m
        memory: 256Mi
      limits:
        cpu: 1000m
        memory: 512Mi
    env: []
    healthCheck:
      path: /healthz
      port: 8443
      scheme: HTTPS

  notification-service:
    enabled: true
    replicaCount: 1
    image:
      repository: myorg/notification-service
      tag: "1.0.0"
    port: 8443
    resources:
      requests:
        cpu: 50m
        memory: 64Mi
      limits:
        cpu: 250m
        memory: 128Mi
    env: []
    healthCheck:
      path: /healthz
      port: 8443
      scheme: HTTPS

networkPolicies:
  enabled: true

podDisruptionBudget:
  enabled: true
  minAvailable: 1

serviceAccount:
  create: true
  automountServiceAccountToken: false

ingress:
  enabled: true
  className: nginx
  annotations:
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/ssl-redirect: "true"
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/force-ssl-redirect: "true"
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/hsts: "true"
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/hsts-max-age: "31536000"
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/hsts-include-subdomains: "true"
  host: app.example.com
  tls:
    enabled: true
    secretName: app-tls-secret

---
# templates/_helpers.tpl
{{- define "microservices-stack.fullname" -}}
{{- printf "%s" .Release.Name | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" -}}
{{- end -}}

{{- define "microservices-stack.labels" -}}
helm.sh/chart: {{ .Chart.Name }}-{{ .Chart.Version | replace "+" "_" }}
app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: {{ .Release.Service }}
app.kubernetes.io/part-of: {{ .Chart.Name }}
app.kubernetes.io/version: {{ .Chart.AppVersion | quote }}
{{- end -}}

{{- define "microservices-stack.selectorLabels" -}}
app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ .serviceName }}
app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .releaseName }}
{{- end -}}

{{- define "microservices-stack.imageRef" -}}
{{- $registry := .global.imageRegistry -}}
{{- if $registry -}}
{{- printf "%s/%s:%s" $registry .image.repository .image.tag -}}
{{- else -}}
{{- printf "%s:%s" .image.repository .image.tag -}}
{{- end -}}
{{- end -}}

---
# templates/namespace.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
    pod-security.kubernetes.io/enforce: restricted
    pod-security.kubernetes.io/enforce-version: latest
    pod-security.kubernetes.io/audit: restricted
    pod-security.kubernetes.io/warn: restricted

---
# templates/serviceaccount.yaml
{{- if .Values.serviceAccount.create }}
{{- range $serviceName, $serviceConfig := .Values.services }}
{{- if $serviceConfig.enabled }}
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: {{ $serviceName }}
  namespace: {{ $.Release.Namespace }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" $ | nindent 4 }}
    app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ $serviceName }}
automountServiceAccountToken: {{ $.Values.serviceAccount.automountServiceAccountToken }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}

---
# templates/deployment.yaml
{{- range $serviceName, $serviceConfig := .Values.services }}
{{- if $serviceConfig.enabled }}
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ $serviceName }}
  namespace: {{ $.Release.Namespace }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" $ | nindent 4 }}
    app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ $serviceName }}
spec:
  replicas: {{ $serviceConfig.replicaCount }}
  revisionHistoryLimit: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ $serviceName }}
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ $.Release.Name }}
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxUnavailable: 0
      maxSurge: 1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ $serviceName }}
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ $.Release.Name }}
        {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" $ | nindent 8 }}
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: {{ $serviceName }}
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      {{- if $.Values.global.imagePullSecrets }}
      imagePullSecrets:
        {{- toYaml $.Values.global.imagePullSecrets | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 65534
        runAsGroup: 65534
        fsGroup: 65534
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      topologySpreadConstraints:
        - maxSkew: 1
          topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
          whenUnsatisfiable: DoNotSchedule
          labelSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ $serviceName }}
      containers:
        - name: {{ $serviceName }}
          image: {{ include "microservices-stack.imageRef" (dict "global" $.Values.global "image" $serviceConfig.image) }}
          imagePullPolicy: {{ $.Values.global.imagePullPolicy }}
          ports:
            - name: https
              containerPort: {{ $serviceConfig.port }}
              protocol: TCP
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: 65534
            runAsGroup: 65534
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
            seccompProfile:
              type: RuntimeDefault
            privileged: false
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: {{ $serviceConfig.resources.requests.cpu }}
              memory: {{ $serviceConfig.resources.requests.memory }}
            limits:
              cpu: {{ $serviceConfig.resources.limits.cpu }}
              memory: {{ $serviceConfig.resources.limits.memory }}
          {{- if $serviceConfig.env }}
          envFrom:
            - secretRef:
                name: {{ $serviceName }}-env-secrets
          {{- end }}
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: {{ $serviceConfig.healthCheck.path }}
              port: {{ $serviceConfig.healthCheck.port }}
              scheme: {{ $serviceConfig.healthCheck.scheme }}
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: {{ $serviceConfig.healthCheck.path }}
              port: {{ $serviceConfig.healthCheck.port }}
              scheme: {{ $serviceConfig.healthCheck.scheme }}
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 3
            failureThreshold: 3
          startupProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: {{ $serviceConfig.healthCheck.path }}
              port: {{ $serviceConfig.healthCheck.port }}
              scheme: {{ $serviceConfig.healthCheck.scheme }}
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 30
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp
              mountPath: /tmp
            - name: tls-certs
              mountPath: /etc/tls
              readOnly: true
      volumes:
        - name: tmp
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 64Mi
        - name: tls-certs
          secret:
            secretName: {{ $serviceName }}-tls
            optional: false
{{- end }}
{{- end }}

---
# templates/service.yaml
{{- range $serviceName, $serviceConfig := .Values.services }}
{{- if $serviceConfig.enabled }}
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: {{ $serviceName }}
  namespace: {{ $.Release.Namespace }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" $ | nindent 4 }}
    app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ $serviceName }}
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ $serviceName }}
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ $.Release.Name }}
  ports:
    - name: https
      port: 443
      targetPort: {{ $serviceConfig.port }}
      protocol: TCP
{{- end }}
{{- end }}

---
# templates/networkpolicy.yaml
{{- if .Values.networkPolicies.enabled }}
# Default deny all ingress and egress for the namespace
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-deny-all
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
---
# Allow DNS egress for all pods
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-dns-egress
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
    - Egress
  egress:
    - to: []
      ports:
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 53
---
# API Gateway: allow ingress from ingress controller, allow egress to internal services
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-policy
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: api-gateway
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: ingress-nginx
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8443
  egress:
    - to:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8443
---
# Internal services: allow ingress only from api-gateway
{{- range $serviceName, $serviceConfig := .Values.services }}
{{- if and $serviceConfig.enabled (ne $serviceName "api-gateway") }}
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: {{ $serviceName }}-policy
  namespace: {{ $.Release.Namespace }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" $ | nindent 4 }}
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ $serviceName }}
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/name: api-gateway
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: {{ $serviceConfig.port }}
  egress:
    - to:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ $.Release.Name }}
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8443
{{- end }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}

---
# templates/pdb.yaml
{{- if .Values.podDisruptionBudget.enabled }}
{{- range $serviceName, $serviceConfig := .Values.services }}
{{- if and $serviceConfig.enabled (gt (int $serviceConfig.replicaCount) 1) }}
---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: {{ $serviceName }}
  namespace: {{ $.Release.Namespace }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" $ | nindent 4 }}
    app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ $serviceName }}
spec:
  minAvailable: {{ $.Values.podDisruptionBudget.minAvailable }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ $serviceName }}
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ $.Release.Name }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}

---
# templates/ingress.yaml
{{- if .Values.ingress.enabled }}
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: {{ include "microservices-stack.fullname" . }}-ingress
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
  annotations:
    {{- toYaml .Values.ingress.annotations | nindent 4 }}
spec:
  ingressClassName: {{ .Values.ingress.className }}
  {{- if .Values.ingress.tls.enabled }}
  tls:
    - hosts:
        - {{ .Values.ingress.host }}
      secretName: {{ .Values.ingress.tls.secretName }}
  {{- end }}
  rules:
    - host: {{ .Values.ingress.host }}
      http:
        paths:
          - path: /
            pathType: Prefix
            backend:
              service:
                name: api-gateway
                port:
                  number: 443
{{- end }}

---
# templates/resourcequota.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ResourceQuota
metadata:
  name: {{ include "microservices-stack.fullname" . }}-quota
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
spec:
  hard:
    requests.cpu: "4"
    requests.memory: 4Gi
    limits.cpu: "8"
    limits.memory: 8Gi
    pods: "20"
    services: "10"

---
# templates/limitrange.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: LimitRange
metadata:
  name: {{ include "microservices-stack.fullname" . }}-limits
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
spec:
  limits:
    - type: Container
      default:
        cpu: 500m
        memory: 256Mi
      defaultRequest:
        cpu: 100m
        memory: 128Mi
      max:
        cpu: "2"
        memory: 2Gi
      min:
        cpu: 50m
        memory: 32Mi
    - type: Pod
      max:
        cpu: "4"
        memory: 4Gi

---
# templates/NOTES.txt
# Microservices Stack deployed successfully!
#
# Services deployed:
# {{- range $serviceName, $serviceConfig := .Values.services }}
# {{- if $serviceConfig.enabled }}
#   - {{ $serviceName }} ({{ $serviceConfig.replicaCount }} replicas)
# {{- end }}
# {{- end }}
#
# Security features enabled:
#   - Pod Security Standards: restricted
#   - Read-only root filesystem
#   - Non-root containers (UID 65534)
#   - All capabilities dropped
#   - Seccomp profile: RuntimeDefault
#   - Network policies: {{ .Values.networkPolicies.enabled }}
#   - TLS enforced on ingress
#   - Service account token automount disabled
#   - Resource quotas and limit ranges applied
#
# IMPORTANT: Ensure the following secrets exist before deployment:
# {{- range $serviceName, $serviceConfig := .Values.services }}
# {{- if $serviceConfig.enabled }}
#   - {{ $serviceName }}-tls (TLS certificate and key)
# {{- end }}
# {{- end }}
#   - {{ .Values.ingress.tls.secretName }} (Ingress TLS secret)
#   - registry-credentials (Image pull secret)
